name: 690 BUTLER LLC
address: 690 NE BUTLER MARKET ROAD, BEND, OR 97702

fr.recommendations: Enhancing emergency responder effectiveness on the property could be achieved by ensuring the single access point remains clear and easily identifiable at all times. Regularly trimming trees or shrubs in the landscaped area can improve visibility and allow unobstructed movement. Clearly marking fire lanes and maintaining clear signage in the vehicle parking area could facilitate swift responder navigation and staging efficiency. The limited rear access might be addressed by creating pathways or designated walkways to enable responders to reach all areas quickly if needed. Additionally, maintaining pathways around the main building and detached structure clear of obstacles may support efficient access and operations during emergencies.

wildfire.recommendations: Improving defensible space around the property may involve increasing the separation between vegetation and the structure. Selective thinning or removal of combustible vegetation directly adjacent to the structure can help reduce potential structure exposure. Expanding defensible space by managing vegetation density around the immediate perimeter could further reduce fuel continuity and enhance the property's preparedness. This might involve trimming or removing dense or continuous vegetation patches and ensuring that vegetation is well-maintained within this zone. Maintaining clear and open access routes to the property would also support firefighter access and suppression efforts. These measures could improve the property's resilience against wildfire impact and support ongoing mitigation strategies.
